post_fix_verification.commit_05ae8595_QA301: CONCERNS: (1) EFFECTIVE_WEIGHT_FLOOR=0.90 hardcoded as local variable; not in defaults.py (CSR-401). (2) 250+ result.json files remain at metrics_schema_version=6.1.0; backfill_v6_2_0_soft_score.py not created (CSR-402). (3) test_three_none_with_top3_valid_now_fails method name contradicts content (CSR-403). Golden tests 5 items / numeric values / METRICS_SCHEMA_VERSION correctly updated.
post_fix_verification.commit_15d62e62_CSR: CONCERNS: (1) validate_instrument / validate_timeframe not called in 5 CLI commands: context, explore-priority, data fetch, data fetch-secondary, data check (CSR-404). (2) 7 locations in main.py build Path(strategies)/generation_id CWD-relative, bypassing _strategies_dir absolute logic (CSR-405). CSR-306 fix in context_builder.py:548 correctly applied. CSR-302 parent_id fix at main.py:L147 correctly applied. CSR-303 generation_id validation correctly applied in validate/backtest/metrics/score/evaluate.

findings.title: EFFECTIVE_WEIGHT_FLOOR=0.90 hardcoded as local variable; not managed in defaults.py
findings.description: QA-301 introduced EFFECTIVE_WEIGHT_FLOOR=0.90 as local variable in _compute_soft_score_redistributed (L686), violating CLAUDE.md magic-number prohibition and the defaults.py Final constant rule. Future [change:tuning] changes may be missed. DRY violation with GATE_TIER2_SOFT_SCORE_MIN which is correctly in defaults.py.
findings.reproduction: Read runner.py L686; no matching constant in defaults.py.
findings.suggested_fix: Add GATE_TIER2_EFFECTIVE_WEIGHT_FLOOR: Final[float] = 0.90 to defaults.py, import and reference in runner.py, add assert GATE_TIER2_EFFECTIVE_WEIGHT_FLOOR > GATE_TIER2_SOFT_SCORE_MIN.

findings.title: QA-301 [change:spec] backfill not performed: 250+ strategies retain old FLOOR=0.70 soft_score
findings.description: spec_change_log.md L27 explicitly states backfill is deferred. 250+ result.json files have metrics_schema_version=6.1.0; zero have 6.2.0. scripts/backfill_v6_2_0_soft_score.py does not exist. Strategies computed with FLOOR=0.70 may have false-positive Tier2 PASS results for 3-4 None indicator scenarios. Violates CLAUDE.md [change:spec] step 6.
findings.reproduction: backfill_v6_2_0_soft_score.py does not exist. Re-computing with FLOOR=0.90 expected to flip some overall_passed True->False.
findings.suggested_fix: Create scripts/backfill_v6_2_0_soft_score.py. Recompute gate_check.soft_score with FLOOR=0.90. Update metrics_schema_version to 6.2.0. Run audit_schema_drift.py to confirm version_outdated=0. Remove newly-failed strategies from FTS candidates immediately.

findings.title: Method name test_three_none_with_top3_valid_now_fails contradicts test content which verifies PASS
findings.description: Method at L77 is named test_three_none_with_top3_valid_now_fails but asserts result >= 0.70 (verifying PASS). Name implies FAIL is expected. Future maintainers may be misled into assuming FAIL and incorrectly modify the behavior.
findings.reproduction: Reading the method name implies the 3-None scenario should FAIL; test body verifies it PASSes.
findings.suggested_fix: Rename to test_three_none_with_top3_valid_still_passes. Update docstring to clarify this scenario must PASS.

findings.title: validate_instrument / validate_timeframe not applied in 5 CLI commands; path traversal gap from CSR-MISSED-004 fix
findings.description: commit 15d62e62 added validate_instrument / validate_timeframe to path_safety.py but main.py does not import them. Five commands accept instrument/timeframe without validation: (1) context L619, (2) explore-priority L739-740, (3) data fetch L780, (4) data fetch-secondary L792, (5) data check L828. The context command passes instrument to build_generation_context which calls get_parquet_path for path construction - highest risk. CSR-MISSED-004 fix was not applied to all CLI entry points.
evidence: atlas/main.py:32 - only validate_generation_id imported; validate_instrument/validate_timeframe absent
atlas/main.py:619-660 - context command: no validate before build_generation_context
atlas/utils/path_safety.py:56-81 - validate_instrument defined but zero call sites
findings.reproduction: grep -rn validate_instrument atlas/ returns only definition in path_safety.py; zero calls in main.py.
findings.suggested_fix: Import validate_instrument and validate_timeframe in main.py. Apply try/except ValueError guard at top of all 5 commands. Follow validate_generation_id pattern at L187-190.

findings.title: main.py builds strategies/ paths 7 times as CWD-relative, bypassing runner.py::_strategies_dir absolute-path logic
findings.description: runner.py._strategies_dir() resolves paths via _ATLAS_ROOT (absolute-first). main.py has 7 locations constructing Path('strategies')/generation_id directly (CWD-relative), bypassing the absolute-path logic. When called from a different CWD, runner.py succeeds but main.py may fail. Structural DRY violation with limited current impact.
findings.reproduction: Run python -m atlas.main metrics ATLAS-... from outside ATLAS root. main.py raises FileNotFoundError while runner.py resolves correctly.
findings.suggested_fix: Add public strategies_dir(generation_id)->Path to atlas/utils/path_safety.py with same absolute-path-first logic. Unify all 7 locations in main.py. Implementable as [refactor].

findings.title: validate_generation_id 80-char limit is a magic number embedded in regex; not managed as Final constant in defaults.py
findings.description: _GENERATION_ID_RE = r'^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{1,80}' uses 80 as an undocumented magic number inside the regex, not in defaults.py. Violates CLAUDE.md magic-number prohibition. Future ID scheme changes may silently conflict.
findings.reproduction: Pass 81-char generation_id; ValueError raised but constraint rationale unreadable from code.
findings.suggested_fix: Add GENERATION_ID_MAX_LENGTH: Final[int] = 80 to defaults.py. Reference it in path_safety.py when building the regex.

warnings.detail: test_three_none_with_top3_valid_now_fails name implies FAIL but body verifies PASS. Recorded as CSR-403.

250+ result.json files at 6.1.0; zero at 6.2.0. Strategies with false-positive PASS under old FLOOR=0.70 may currently be in FTS. Recommend pausing FTS new strategy intake until backfill completes. Recorded as CSR-402.

summary.most_urgent: CSR-402: QA-301 backfill not executed. 250+ overall_passed values computed under old FLOOR=0.70. Create and run scripts/backfill_v6_2_0_soft_score.py urgently.
